## Runtime.Indexers.RecipeIndexerOrchestrator.find() method

Finds recipes matching a query specification.

**Signature:**

```typescript
find(spec: IRecipeQuerySpec, options?: IFindOptions): Result<ReadonlyArray<IRuntimeRecipe>>;
```
